PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?singer ?nationality WHERE {
  wd:Q815342 wdt:P1527 ?episode .
  ?episode wdt:P2044 ?performance .
  ?performance wdt:P715 ?song .
  ?song wdt:P2093 ?singer .
  ?singer wdt:P27 ?nationality .
  ?performance wdt:P1497 ?score .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?score)
LIMIT 1
